chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/10)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/10)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَلِيِّ بْنَ مُطَهَّرٍ يَذْكُرُ أَنَّهُ قَدْ رَآهُ وَ وَصَفَ لَهُ قَدَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Fat’h, a slave of Al Zarary who said,
‘I heard Abu Ali Bin Mut’har mention that he had seen him<sup>asws</sup>, and described his<sup>asws</sup> tallness to him’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Fath, Mawla (slave) of al-Zurari who has said the following. “I heard abu Ali ibn Mutahhar saying that has seen him (the twelfth Imam) and would describe his (Imam’s) figure.”
